query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
Research complete. Summary of findings:

**ETF Net Flows — outflows ARE continuing into the June 29–July 3, 2026 week:**
- June 29: −$238.1M | June 30: −$241.1M | July 1: ≈−$296M
- These extend heavy late-June outflows (Jun 24: −$424.3M, Jun 25: −$688.7M, Jun 26: −$525.4M)
- Follows a record 13-day streak (May 15–Jun 3) of ~$4.4B outflows (longest since the Jan-2024 launch). IBIT was the main bleeder (~$2.1B in June) despite brief recovery days on June 5 and June 12.

**Bitcoin Price — late-June downtrend to multi-year lows, small early-July bounce:**
- Fell below $60,000 around June 25 to lowest levels since 2024; closed $58,558.86 on June 30 (recent low), intraday low ~$57,950 on July 1 (~652-day low)
- June closed down ~20%; BTC is ~51% below its ~$126,198 Oct-2025 high
- Modest technical bounce early July: $60,003.76 (Jul 1) → $61,427.41 (Jul 2, +3.3%), but 10-day (−3.9%) and 20-day (−3.3%) returns remain negative
- Sentiment: Extreme Fear (Fear & Greed ~11); the drop below $64K triggered $1.1B+ in liquidations

All data points, sources, and key facts have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.
